reach_why: It extends familiar critiques of hidden scale and alignment bias, but does not open wholly new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: It non-obviously links latent pretraining dependence with selection bias against weird-but-valuable breakthrough candidates.
falsifiable_why: Ablations can test hidden scale dependence and whether stricter human-judgment filtering suppresses later-valued anomalous outputs.
explanation: Architecture-only claims need isolation from hidden scale; strict human filtering may erase breakthrough-generating anomalies.
